## inputfile.py: https://github.com/bkuz114/inputfile-parser
- Version: 1.0.0+ (commit 1e21de5)

- Original license: MIT
- Files vendored:
  - inputfile.py
- Modifications: None (vendored as-is)
- Reason: Provides parsing ability for input JSON files

## Vendor Maintenance Notes
- Do not edit vendored files directly; modify source and re-vendor
